reason: SSH to pdx1-shared-a2-06.dreamhost.com blocked by cloud environment network policy (port 22 timeout). GitHub Actions workflow_dispatch returned 403 (MCP token lacks dispatch permission). Push to main did not auto-trigger workflow (deploy-artonly-bluesky-2026-06-25.sh committed to main at SHA 2c78c13ba3a0a67634c0783912a445e3c90fa5f8).

articles_identified.title: Hard-Fi Return Unburdened, and It Shows
Myles Smith Arrives Where the Story Gets Hard

action_taken: deploy-artonly-bluesky-2026-06-25.sh committed to main. Draft email created to amosleblanc@gmail.com. Push notification sent.
resolution_options: Option A (fastest): Go to https://github.com/bremobonus/vossadvisory/actions/workflows/deploy-artonly.yml and click Run workflow, enter script name: deploy-artonly-bluesky-2026-06-25.sh
Option B: SSH to server manually and run: python3 ~/artonly.io/agent/bluesky-poster.py <handle> <app_password>
Option C: Add BLUESKY_HANDLE and BLUESKY_APP_PASSWORD as GitHub Actions secrets so the cloud agent can post directly without SSH
recurring_issue: This same SSH block has occurred on June 12, June 14, and June 25. A permanent fix is needed.
